executed_commands: manual verification of every high-confidence anomaly
notes: This audit focused on semantic integrity: prompt/option/explanation alignment.
The confirmed issues below were observed before regenerating bank.json from scripts/rebuild-bank.mjs.
Several corrupt rows were repaired by restoring the canonical generator output.

summary.repair_strategy: Regenerate bank.json from the canonical generator and fail validation if bank.json drifts from that generator output.
